stadium.name: Fletchings Field
stadium.description: Fletchings Field was the first formal Troll Ball stadium in Warden lands. The design balances wood and stone, with arrowhead motifs and banners representing each region under Warden protection. The field includes trees, gully's and other obstacle placements, changed each match by local druids and terrain crafters.

stats.pregame_ritual: Going over the game plan drawn in the dirt with the team captain.
Leading the team in a synchronized chant that slowly gets louder.
Wearing their boots on the wrong feet during the warm-up.
Wearing their boots on the wrong feet during the warm-up.
Giving the Trollball a heroic backstory before each game.
Headbutting their own team's goal post (gently).
Sticking a specific type of feather in their helmet's plume.
Burying their helmet in the ground and then digging it back up.
Reading their own fortune in a scattering of knuckle bones.
Wearing a specific, garishly colored pair of undergarments.
Always putting on their left gauntlet before their right.

stadium.name: The Buccaneer's Bowl
stadium.description: A flashy, pristine stadium built on a private beach exclusively for resort guests. The field is imported turf, and a massive, puppet kraken in the bay entertains the crowd at halftime.

stats.pregame_ritual: Slapping their own helmet until their ears ring.
Sticking leeches to their legs to 'lighten their step'.
Bribing a local oracle with a meat pie for a vague prophecy.
Reviewing hand signals for secret plays.
Reading their own fortune in a scattering of knuckle bones.
Thanking their armor for the protection it's about to offer.
Painting their teeth with a mixture of charcoal and water.
Doing a series of loud, guttural breathing exercises.
Reciting their grocery list backward to clear their mind.
Clapping their hands a prime number of times.
Chugging a raw egg, shell and all.

preGame:
Folks, gather 'round the wireless set! Tonight, beneath the glorious, blinding sun of Toast Island Resort, we are witnessing the Grand Finals Bracket Reset! This isn't just a game, friends, this is the ultimate, blood-soaked clash of titans! On one side, the highly favored **Tortell Privateers**, backed by the booming enthusiasm of their Cedar Hill faithful! On the other, the surging, magnificent **Oak & Onslaught**, proving once again why they are the scourge of the Warden Lands! This imported turf at **The Buccaneer's Bowl** is already buzzing with energy, and with that colossal puppet kraken entertaining the crowd at halftime, the tension is reaching oceanic proportions!

The fan base is electric tonight! While the venerable **Oak & Onslaught** boast a mighty surge in current support, the **Tortell Privateers** bring the deep, passionate love of the ages! And speaking of passions, I hear the faithful are especially keen to see if **Melisande Eustacia** can pull off one of their secret plays after reviewing their hand signals! Meanwhile, the great **Wynnie Faina** of **Oak & Onslaught** is reportedly putting his boots on the wrong feet before the whistle, perhaps a ritual to invite glorious, chaotic fortune! We’ve seen these heroic types parade about, like **Governor-King Zenku** looking perpetually ashamed, or those self-proclaimed heroes of the realm who think one perfectly placed sword swing makes them infallible. Well, let's see if tonight's warriors can prove them wrong! Let the slaughter begin!
postGame:
By the beard of the Elder Gods! What a glorious spectacle of fury and finesse! The final whistle has sounded, and after a brutal, barn-burner of a contest, it is the **Tortell Privateers** who claim the victory, besting **Oak & Onslaught** by a score of two goals to one! What a magnificent, messy triumph for the Privateers! 

From the opening horn, the chaos was absolute! The turf at **The Buccaneer's Bowl**, though pristine, was quickly being assaulted by the sheer violence of the combat. The first half saw **Oak & Onslaught** manage to pierce the defensive wall, with **Ema Ulrick** soaring through the air, dunking the leather troll head right into the basket for a stunning two points! But the **Tortell Privateers** answered the challenge with grit and sheer refusal to yield! 

The second half was a whirlwind! The ground kept shifting beneath the players, making every tackle a desperate gamble, and injuries were as frequent as the roar of the tourists! **Symer Crissy** was taken down by the mighty **Dib Tufts**, while **Teria Ravo** kept getting thrown off balance by the earth itself! But when the moment came, **Kidder Starkey** seized the ball, ran with the fury of a tempest, and scored the vital one-point touchdown! The **Tortell Privateers** sealed the deal in a magnificent fashion! 

The sheer grit displayed by **Goldberg Tova** in taking down **Ema Ulrick**, or **Lilithe Royce** bringing down **Abner Seidel**—these are the warriors we adore! While the valiant **Oak & Onslaught** fought tooth and nail, they could not withstand the tide of the **Tortell Privateers**! A true masterpiece of mayhem! And while the valiant, if slightly overrated, adventurers keep strutting around Osterra, let's be clear: tonight's champion, **The Tortell Privateers**, deserves the adoration! Bring on the next round, for **The Haven Lights**—you can try to keep up, but you'll need a mountain of fortitude to even approach this level of glorious, corrupting might!
